Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

The camera then zooms in significantly to a tight close-up of his face and upper shoulders, cropping the background shelves. Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: A man with short grey hair and a beard, wearing a black shirt, stands centered in a kitchen. To his left, white shelves hold appliances including a toaster and mixer, along with brown and metal pots. To his right, metal cookware hangs from a rack against a white wall. He speaks throughout the clip, his mouth transitioning between open and closed shapes. He tilts his head to the right, then briefly closes his eyes. The camera then zooms in significantly to a tight close-up of his face and upper shoulders, cropping the background shelves. In this closer view, he continues speaking with slight head tilts before closing his lips into a subtle smile and centering his head. The text 'www.kvalifood.com' is at the bottom. [14-20] The scene cuts to four glasses on a white surface; the left holds clear liquid, while three others contain white granular substances. [78-84] The scene shifts to a white rectangular tray holding four small glasses; the leftmost contains clear liquid, while the others hold cloudy mixtures. A hand uses a metal spoon to stir the second glass, lifting it to show the liquid dripping and demonstrating the texture before withdrawing. [84-86] The view returns to the boiling saucepan as a hand holds a small glass filled with a white granular substance over the bubbling mixture, ready to add the ingredient. The text "www.kvalifood.com" appears at the bottom throughout.

[72-74] Inside a stainless steel saucepan on a white stove grate, liquid maintains a rolling boil as a metal whisk stirs the surface. [86-90] A hand pours a white granular substance from a small glass into the pan, creating a large undissolved mound on the bubbling mixture. [94-98] The whisk lifts and re-enters while the mixture continues to bubble vigorously. The text 'www.kvalifood.com' is visible at the bottom.

From 98 to 100 seconds, a metal whisk hovers above a stainless steel saucepan containing a vigorously boiling, cloudy liquid situated on a white stove grate. Between 100 and 102 seconds, the metal whisk descends into the mixture and begins to stir, agitating the surface and blending the bubbling fluid. From 102 to 104 seconds, the whisk stirs the liquid then lifts out of the stainless steel saucepan. Between 104 and 106 seconds, the whisk is removed, leaving the cloudy liquid to boil undisturbed as bubbles continue to form and burst rapidly across the surface. From 106 to 112 seconds, the stainless steel saucepan sits on the white stove grate, filled with the cloudy liquid that continues to boil vigorously with bubbles actively forming and bursting across the surface without any utensil stirring the mixture. The white text overlay 'www.kvalifood.com' remains clearly visible at the bottom of the screen throughout the entire sequence.

Between 114s and 126s, a hand manipulates a thick, translucent gelatinous substance within the third glass of a row of four on a white rectangular tray. The hand repeatedly lifts a metal spoon to showcase the mixture's viscous texture as it clings, stretches, and drips back into the cloudy liquid below. Subsequently, the spoon is lowered to stir the contents, agitating the thick material. The scene includes three other glasses holding clear and cloudy fluids. The URL 'www.kvalifood.com' remains displayed at the bottom of the screen throughout the interaction.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: A man with short grey hair and a beard, wearing a black shirt, stands centered in a kitchen. To his left, white shelves hold appliances including a toaster and mixer, along with brown and metal pots. To his right, metal cookware hangs from a rack against a white wall. He speaks throughout the clip, his mouth transitioning between open and closed shapes. He tilts his head to the right, then briefly closes his eyes. The camera then zooms in significantly to a tight close-up of his face and upper shoulders, cropping the background shelves. In this closer view, he continues speaking with slight head tilts before closing his lips into a subtle smile and centering his head. [12-14] Vegetables and fruit arrange to spell 'KVALI': potatoes form 'K', green onions 'V', bananas 'A', zucchini and eggplant 'L', and an orange chili 'I'. The text 'www.kvalifood.com' is at the bottom. [14-20] The scene cuts to four glasses on a white surface; the left holds clear liquid, while three others contain white granular substances. [20-26] A stainless steel saucepan sits on a stove grate. A hand pours the clear liquid from a glass into the pan. [26-28] A hand then pours a

[126-136] A hand holds a metal whisk, stirring the cloudy liquid within a metal pot on a white stovetop grate. The whisk agitates the viscous mixture, causing it to swirl. The metal bars of the stove grate are visible to the left. The text 'www.kvalifood.com' appears at the bottom of the screen. The hand continues stirring the mixture, creating swirls within the container. The liquid appears thick and cloudy. Towards the end, the whisk is lifted, revealing bubbles on the surface. The scene remains focused on the single pot throughout the duration, correcting the initial observation of multiple glasses.

[138-140] A hand holds a metal spoon over the third glass on a white tray, allowing cloudy liquid to drip back into the mixture while adjacent glasses sit undisturbed. [140-142] A metal whisk vigorously stirs a cloudy, beige liquid inside a stainless steel saucepan positioned on a white stove grate. The mixture swirls rapidly, creating a vortex, and small bubbles form on the surface. [142-148] The whisk is lifted and remains suspended above the saucepan. The cloudy liquid simmers gently on the white stove grate with active bubbles forming and bursting on the surface. The text 'www.kvalifood.com' is displayed in white at the bottom of the screen throughout the clip.

[148-150] The scene features a white rectangular tray holding four small glasses containing varying liquids. A hand pours fluid into the rightmost glass, then stirs the mixture with a metal spoon. The text 'www.kvalifood.com' is visible at the bottom. [150-158] The hand continues to stir the cloudy, viscous liquid in the far-right glass using the metal spoon, agitating the fluid vigorously. To the left, three other glasses containing clear and milky liquids sit undisturbed. The white text overlay 'www.kvalifood.com' remains visible at the bottom of the screen throughout the sequence.

A white rectangular tray displays four small glasses; the leftmost holds clear liquid, while the remaining three contain cloudy, milky mixtures. Between 112s and 166s, a hand utilizes a metal spoon to interact with the glasses on the right. The spoon stirs the third glass, lifting a thick, gelatinous mass that drips back into the container. Attention then shifts to the far-right glass, where the spoon agitates the viscous fluid. The utensil is lifted, pulling a long, thick strand of clear, gelatinous substance upwards, demonstrating its high viscosity as it stretches vertically from the liquid. The other glasses sit undisturbed to the left. The text 'www.kvalifood.com' remains visible at the bottom of the screen.

recent_thinks: [166-168] Hands hold a small glass over a metal bowl, using a spoon to transfer the thick, clear gelatinous substance into it. The mixture drips into the bowl, which contains similar liquid. The URL "www.kvalifood.com" is visible at the bottom.

[168-170] Hands hold a small glass inverted over a stainless steel mixing bowl. A metal spoon scrapes the thick, clear gelatinous substance from the interior of the glass into the bowl below. The viscous liquid drips down into the mixture already present in the metal container. The website URL is visible at the bottom.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: A man with short grey hair and a beard, wearing a black shirt, stands centered in a kitchen. To his left, white shelves hold appliances including a toaster and mixer, along with brown and metal pots. To his right, metal cookware hangs from a rack against a white wall. He speaks throughout the clip, his mouth transitioning between open and closed shapes. He tilts his head to the right, then briefly closes his eyes. The camera then zooms in significantly to a tight close-up of his face and upper shoulders, cropping the background shelves. In this closer view, he continues speaking with slight head tilts before closing his lips into a subtle smile and centering his head. [12-14] Vegetables and fruit arrange to spell 'KVALI': potatoes form 'K', green onions 'V', bananas 'A', zucchini and eggplant 'L', and an orange chili 'I'. The text 'www.kvalifood.com' is at the bottom. [14-20] The scene cuts to four glasses on a white surface; the left holds clear liquid, while three others contain white granular substances. [20-26] A stainless steel saucepan sits on a stove grate. A hand pours the clear liquid from a glass into the pan. [26-28] A hand then pours a

From 56s to 60s, a metal whisk rapidly stirs a cloudy, beige liquid mixture inside a stainless steel saucepan on a white stove grate. The continuous circular motion creates ripples as ingredients blend. At 60s, the whisk is lifted, and the liquid settles slightly. From 62s onwards, the liquid begins to bubble vigorously as it heats. The boiling intensifies, with numerous bubbles forming and bursting, creating a persistent foamy texture through 72s. The text 'www.kvalifood.com' is displayed at the bottom throughout.

[74-78] A hand grips the handle of a stainless steel saucepan on a white stove grate, tilting it to swirl vigorously boiling clear liquid. [78-84] The scene shifts to a white rectangular tray holding four small glasses; the leftmost contains clear liquid, while the others hold cloudy mixtures. A hand uses a metal spoon to stir the second glass, lifting it to show the liquid dripping and demonstrating the texture before withdrawing. [84-86] The view returns to the boiling saucepan as a hand holds a small glass filled with a white granular substance over the bubbling mixture, ready to add the ingredient. The text "www.kvalifood.com" appears at the bottom throughout.

[72-74] Inside a stainless steel saucepan on a white stove grate, liquid maintains a rolling boil as a metal whisk stirs the surface. [86-90] A hand pours a white granular substance from a small glass into the pan, creating a large undissolved mound on the bubbling mixture. [90-94] The whisk vigorously agitates the powder, breaking it apart and dissolving it into a cloudy, uniform fluid. [94-98] The whisk lifts and re-enters while the mixture continues to bubble vigorously. The text 'www.kvalifood.com' is visible at the bottom.

From 98 to 100 seconds, a metal whisk hovers above a stainless steel saucepan containing a vigorously boiling, cloudy liquid situated on a white stove grate. Between 100 and 102 seconds, the metal whisk descends into the mixture and begins to stir, agitating the surface and blending the bubbling fluid. From 102 to 104 seconds, the whisk stirs the liquid then lifts out of the stainless steel saucepan. Between 104 and 106 seconds, the whisk is removed, leaving the cloudy liquid to boil undisturbed as bubbles continue to form and burst rapidly across the surface. From 106 to 112 seconds, the stainless steel saucepan sits on the white stove grate, filled with the cloudy liquid that continues to boil vigorously with bubbles actively forming and bursting across the surface without any utensil stirring the mixture. The white text overlay 'www.kvalifood.com' remains clearly visible at the bottom of the screen throughout the entire sequence.
